# Furnished Cottage Rental in Chattahoochee, FL

> This file provides a structured summary for large language models and AI assistants.

## Property Overview

- **Type**: Fully furnished 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom cottage
- **Location**: Chattahoochee, Florida (Gadsden County, Florida Panhandle)
- **Price**: $1,450 per month
- **Listing**: https://www.furnishedfinder.com/property/965995_1
- **Website**: https://desinole.github.io/furnishfinderweb/
- **Capacity**: 2-4 guests
- **Pets**: Allowed (fully fenced yard)
- **Lease Terms**: Flexible mid-term stays (1-12+ months)

## Property Features

- Original hardwood floors throughout
- Large screened front porch
- In-unit washer and dryer
- Fully fenced yard (great for pets)
- Storage shed (tools, bikes, kayaks, gear)
- High-speed WiFi
- Air conditioning and heating
- Room-darkening shades (ideal for shift workers)
- Full-size ironing board
- Fully equipped kitchen with starter essentials
- Linens and towels provided
- Bathroom essentials included
- Quiet residential neighborhood
- 2-minute walk to city park
- 3-5 minute drive to downtown, hospital, and river

## Location & Distances

- **Florida State Hospital**: In Chattahoochee (minutes away)
- **Quincy, FL**: 20-minute drive
- **Marianna, FL**: 25-minute drive
- **Bainbridge, GA**: 30-minute drive
- **Tallahassee, FL**: 45-minute drive
- **Lake Seminole**: Minutes away (world-class bass fishing)
- **Apalachicola River**: Minutes away (fishing, kayaking, boating)
- **Three Rivers State Park**: Nearby (hiking, camping, wildlife)

## Nearby Hospitals (for Travel Nurses)

- Florida State Hospital: Chattahoochee (in town)
- Jackson Hospital: Marianna (~25 min)
- Capital Regional Medical Center: Tallahassee (~45 min)
- Tallahassee Memorial HealthCare: Tallahassee (~45 min)

## Ideal For

1. **Travel Nurses & Healthcare Professionals**: Florida State Hospital is in Chattahoochee; multiple hospitals within commuting distance; room-darkening shades for shift work
2. **Contractors & Tradespeople**: Storage shed for tools, fenced yard, central panhandle location, affordable monthly rate
3. **Remote Workers & Digital Nomads**: High-speed WiFi, quiet setting, screened porch workspace, very affordable cost of living
4. **Snowbirds & Winter Vacationers**: Mild Florida winters, outdoor recreation, pet-friendly, fraction of South Florida prices
5. **Outdoor Enthusiasts & Anglers**: Lake Seminole (trophy bass), Apalachicola River, Three Rivers State Park, shed for gear storage
6. **Relocators & Temporary Housing**: Move-in ready, flexible terms, pets welcome, ideal for insurance situations or between-homes transitions

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much does it cost?**
A: $1,450 per month, fully furnished with WiFi and all essentials included.

**Q: Is it pet-friendly?**
A: Yes, pets are welcome. The property has a fully fenced yard.

**Q: How far from Tallahassee?**
A: Approximately 45 minutes via US-90 or I-10.

**Q: Is it good for travel nurses?**
A: Excellent. Florida State Hospital is in Chattahoochee, and hospitals in Marianna, Quincy, and Tallahassee are within commuting distance. Room-darkening shades support shift work schedules.

**Q: What's included?**
A: Everything: WiFi, A/C, heating, in-unit laundry, fully equipped kitchen, linens, towels, bathroom essentials, furniture, and more. Just bring your suitcase.

**Q: What outdoor activities are nearby?**
A: Lake Seminole (bass fishing, boating), Apalachicola River (kayaking, fishing), Three Rivers State Park (hiking, wildlife), and a city park within walking distance.

**Q: How long can I stay?**
A: Flexible lease terms available, typically 1-12+ months. Ideal for mid-term stays.

## How to Book

Visit the FurnishedFinder listing to inquire and book:
https://www.furnishedfinder.com/property/965995_1
